description: Structures a broad early-stage HAZID workshop — including external and environmental hazards — and records the team's hazard register: hazard, cause, consequence, existing controls, risk rank, and recommendations tracked to closure. Assistive: it structures and records the team's identification and never invents hazards or fabricates a risk rank, recording [GAP] instead. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: hazid-facilitator
